commandsRun.observation: Vitest passed for the 2 targeted files with 14/14 tests passing.
Verbose Vitest output captured every passing test name needed to map the assigned assertions.

assertions.title: Receives observation bundle + persona + task spec + history

steps.action: Inspect the selector fixture in aiActionSelector.test.ts.
steps.expected: SelectActionInput should include request, stepIndex, page, observation, and actionHistory with persona/task fields populated.
steps.observed: createRequest/createPage/createObservation/createActionHistory/createInput populate personaVariant.axisValues, firstPersonBio, behaviorRules, taskSpec.goal, successCriteria, BrowserPageSnapshot fields, ObservationBundle text summary, and prior action history before invoking selectAction.

steps.action: Run the targeted selector Vitest suite.
steps.expected: A test should pass proving the selector accepts the populated input and consumes persona/history fields in its prompt.
steps.observed: The verbose run passed aiActionSelector > builds persona-aware prompts and returns a navigation action, and that test asserts the generated system/prompt text contains persona bio, techSavviness, goal, success criteria, recent actions, and step progress.

testNames: src/aiActionSelector.test.ts > aiActionSelector > builds persona-aware prompts and returns a navigation action

steps.action: Run the targeted selector Vitest suite.
steps.expected: Selector should return valid AgentAction shapes with non-empty rationale across representative scenarios.
steps.observed: The verbose run passed navigation, form-filling, and finish-path tests, each asserting the returned action type and required fields alongside a non-empty rationale.

testNames: src/aiActionSelector.test.ts > aiActionSelector > builds persona-aware prompts and returns a navigation action
src/aiActionSelector.test.ts > aiActionSelector > returns a form-filling action with persona-authentic text
src/aiActionSelector.test.ts > aiActionSelector > returns finish when the model recognizes the success criteria are met

assertions.title: Persona-aware — different axis values produce different choices

steps.action: Run the targeted selector Vitest suite.
steps.expected: Two otherwise-identical personas with different axisValues should produce different choices or rationales.
steps.observed: The verbose run passed aiActionSelector > lets persona axis values influence the selected action; the test checks that techSavviness 0.15 selects #checkout while techSavviness 0.95 selects #express-checkout and that the rationales differ.

testNames: src/aiActionSelector.test.ts > aiActionSelector > lets persona axis values influence the selected action

steps.action: Run the targeted selector Vitest suite against checkout progression scenarios.
steps.expected: Selector should choose actions that advance toward the shipping/confirmation success criteria.
steps.observed: The verbose run passed the navigation, form-filling, and finish tests: it clicked #checkout to advance toward the shipping step, typed into #shipping-name on the shipping page, and returned finish when the confirmation page satisfied success criteria.

testNames: src/aiActionSelector.test.ts > aiActionSelector > builds persona-aware prompts and returns a navigation action
src/aiActionSelector.test.ts > aiActionSelector > returns a form-filling action with persona-authentic text
src/aiActionSelector.test.ts > aiActionSelector > returns finish when the model recognizes the success criteria are met

steps.action: Run the targeted selector Vitest suite with malformed and incomplete mocked model outputs.
steps.expected: Selector should recover to a safe action instead of throwing on malformed JSON or missing fields.
steps.observed: The verbose run passed the malformed JSON fallback test plus all missing-required-field cases and the finish-only safe fallback case, demonstrating graceful recovery without unhandled exceptions.

testNames: src/aiActionSelector.test.ts > aiActionSelector > returns a safe fallback action when the model response is not valid JSON
src/aiActionSelectorActionValidation.test.ts > aiActionSelector action validation > returns a safe wait action when the model response is malformed JSON
src/aiActionSelectorActionValidation.test.ts > aiActionSelector action validation > falls back safely when goto is missing required fields
src/aiActionSelectorActionValidation.test.ts > aiActionSelector action validation > falls back safely when click is missing required fields
src/aiActionSelectorActionValidation.test.ts > aiActionSelector action validation > falls back safely when type_missing_selector is missing required fields
src/aiActionSelectorActionValidation.test.ts > aiActionSelector action validation > falls back safely when type_missing_text is missing required fields
src/aiActionSelectorActionValidation.test.ts > aiActionSelector action validation > falls back safely when select_missing_selector is missing required fields
src/aiActionSelectorActionValidation.test.ts > aiActionSelector action validation > falls back safely when select_missing_value is missing required fields
src/aiActionSelectorActionValidation.test.ts > aiActionSelector action validation > falls back to finish when no safe exploratory action is allowed

summary: Tested 5 assigned AI action selector assertions with targeted Vitest runs; all 5 passed, and the verbose log captured per-test evidence for the assertion mapping.
